title: 'Last Seen' option for Dashboards
excerpt: Dashboards is the way we present overview/stats etc to the Stakeholders and end users. It is very important and useful to have ‘Last Seen’ option in Dashboards, since it gives us an idea who has viewed it and who haven’t…

posts.author: Akshay_M (Akshay Mahadik)
posts.cookedHtml: Dashboards is the way we present overview/stats etc to the Stakeholders and end users. It is very important and useful to have ‘Last Seen’ option in Dashboards, since it gives us an idea who has viewed it and who haven’t. I am aware Last Seen option can be viewed in boards, but not in Dashboards which are important.
